title: evolvulus gangeticus
intro: Evolvulus gangeticus, commonly known as Blue Plover's Eye, is a flowering plant native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Evolvulus gangeticus include its ability to aid in reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Evolvulus gangeticus can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be extracted and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
